HANDKERCHIEF.Definition: a small piece of cloth used to clean his nose or face

ARTERIAL.Definition: related to blood moving from the heart

DEATH-WARRANT.Definition: a sign that I will soon die

AT ITS PEAK.Definition: at its highest or strongest point

SUPPOSED.Definition: believed or thought to be true

DECLINE.Definition: a slow movement towards death or weakness

ENVIABLE.Definition: making other people wish they had it

DULL MATERIAL WORLD.Definition: an ordinary life focused only on money and physical things

MILLS.Definition: factories where materials were made or processed

FOUNDRIES.Definition: factories where metal was melted and shaped

SUBSISTENCE.Definition: having only the basic things needed to live

VENTILATION.Definition: the movement of fresh air through a place

BREEDING GROUND.Definition: a place where it grew easily

CONTAGIOUS.Definition: able to spread from person to person

BACTERIUM.Definition: a tiny living thing that can cause disease

TENEMENT.Definition: a large building with small poor flats

WASTING AWAY.Definition: becoming thinner and weaker over time

WIDESPREAD.Definition: happening in many places or among many people

PREDISPOSITION.Definition: a natural tendency to get a disease

PREDISPOSED.Definition: naturally more likely to get it

EXCITANTS.Definition: things believed to cause or worsen the illness

COMMENTARY.Definition: spoken or written opinions and discussion

CIRCULATION.Definition: the movement of blood around the body

COLLARBONE.Definition: the bone between the shoulder and neck

WAISTCOATS.Definition: sleeveless jackets worn over a shirt

EXAGGERATED.Definition: made to seem bigger or more important than it really is

COINCIDED WITH.Definition: happened at the same time as

BED-RIDDEN.Definition: unable to leave bed because of illness

LEISURED.Definition: having plenty of free time and money

GAD ABOUT.Definition: to go around socially without serious purpose

WORKHOUSE.Definition: a place where very poor people lived and worked

UNMARKED GRAVE.Definition: a grave without a name or sign

GERM THEORY.Definition: the idea that germs cause disease

CONCLUSIVELY.Definition: in a way that proved it completely

WAXY.Definition: smooth and slightly oily, like wax

SANITARIUM.Definition: a hospital for long-term illness, especially tuberculosis

DEFENCES.Definition: the body’s way of fighting illness

RELAPSE.Definition: become ill again after getting better

SMOG.Definition: dirty air caused by smoke and pollution

MICROORGANISMS.Definition: tiny living things only visible with a microscope

REASONING.Definition: thinking carefully to reach a conclusion

MIRACULOUSLY.Definition: in a surprising and wonderful way

DISBELIEF.Definition: rejection or inability to believe it

SUB-SAHARAN.Definition: relating to the area south of the Sahara Desert in Africa

OVERCROWDING.Definition: having too many people in one place

SIDE EFFECTS.Definition: unwanted results from medicine or treatment
